ksa_text: Skill in designing ethical AI governance frameworks that address responsible AI principles, algorithmic bias mitigation, transparency and explainability requirements, and stakeholder fairness concerns.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: skill contains GOV-relevant signals ("ai governance", "responsible ai") within a Leadership & Strategy context (affinity 0.55). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A manager-level Federated Governance Group Representative would encounter this competency in governance practice.
